title: Angle Result
description: Returns the angle of the found object.
notes:
The Angle result returns the found part's angle in the image coordinate system.  In some cases, you may want to use a Polar object to determine angle because it can be faster and more accurate.

Statistics

For the Angle result, the following statistics are available. AngleMax, AngleMean, AngleMin, AngleStdDev. Please see Statistics in the Vision Guide manual for details about using statistics.
see_also:
Applies To

Vision Objects: Blob, BoxFinder, Correlation, CornerFinder, DefectFinder, Frame, Geometric, Line, LineFinder, Polar, CodeReader, Coordinates
